message:
test(fcp-conformance/symbol-request): pin transcript binding + br-7p8rd pre-verify guards (br-unkhu)

SymbolRequest (fcp-protocol/src/fcps.rs) is the requester-side message
that drives a symbol-transfer exchange. The br-4p4ti fuzz target
proves panic-freedom on adversarial CBOR but no conformance test
pinned the transcript binding or the documented br-7p8rd
anti-amplification guards (oversized missing_hint and max_symbols
above MAX_SYMBOLS_HARD_CAP both refused BEFORE the Ed25519 cycle).

Adds 15 tests against the public fcp_protocol::SymbolRequest API:

- round_trip_sign_then_verify_passes
- request_signed_under_one_key_does_not_verify_under_another
- transcript_binds_to_object_id
- transcript_binds_to_zone_id
- transcript_binds_to_zone_key_id (key-rotation defense)
- transcript_binds_to_epoch_id (cross-epoch replay defense)
- transcript_binds_to_max_symbols (amplification defense)
- transcript_binds_to_current_symbols (sizing-decision integrity)
- transcript_binds_to_missing_hint_contents
- transcript_binds_to_missing_hint_presence (None vs Some discriminant)
- transcript_binds_to_missing_hint_count
- header_field_is_not_part_of_signed_transcript (documented context-only
  separation, mirrors SymbolAck and DecodeStatus)
- oversized_missing_hint_is_rejected_pre_verify (br-7p8rd guard #1)
- max_symbols_above_hard_cap_is_rejected_pre_verify (br-7p8rd guard #2
  at MAX_SYMBOLS_HARD_CAP + 1)
- max_symbols_at_hard_cap_is_accepted_when_signature_is_valid
  (boundary acceptance — the cap is exclusive only above)

All 15 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
symbol_request_signing_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
